nl_query: List all BOOLEAN-type configurations at global scope.
failed_sql:
SELECT c.config_key, c.config_value, c.data_type, c.description, c.updated_at
FROM   configuration c
JOIN   unit_type_config utc ON utc.unit_type = c.unit_type
JOIN   app_user au ON au.id = c.updated_by
WHERE  utc.unit_type = 'COURSE'
  AND  c.data_type = 'BOOLEAN'
  AND  c.scope_type = 'GLOBAL'
  AND  c.scope_id IS NULL
ORDER  BY c.config_key;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): configuration.unit_type. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
